name: shallowswe-codex-mini-calibration-v0.1
description: Cheap Codex exec calibration panel for one-shot floor and plumbing probes. Calibration runs are quarantined from published leaderboard results.

selection_policy.purpose: Measure whether Codex exec with a mini model can provide a cheaper floor-probe or plumbing-calibration signal before broader calibration spend.
selection_policy.published_stats_policy: Calibration rollouts do not count as published leaderboard rollouts.
selection_policy.versioning_policy: Bump the panel version when the selected Codex model, reasoning effort, or Codex scaffold behavior changes materially.
